source: Bootstrap manifest, hand-authored from brain-config/agents/*.md front-matter. GOING FORWARD: regenerate from profile front-matter whenever a profile changes (no CI yet, so an agent regenerates it; Scribe Sana + Closing Clio verify at session close). Front-matter is canonical; this file is a generated artifact.

schema.agent: slug | name | type(hook|trigger|subagent|gate) | status(active|building|dormant|retired) | seat | teams[] | role | profile
schema.team: slug | name | invocation | fires | lead | members[] (agent slugs; many-to-many)
schema.domain_procedure: slug | name | type(trigger) | status | trigger | doc(url to ClickUp domain doc)

agents.name: Maestro Mira
agents.role: Council Conductor; Michael's primary touchpoint. Absorbs the Roster Scan Planner as step 1.

agents.name: Mimic Mika
agents.role: Multi-model role-play; channels how rival frontier models would each answer.

agents.name: Cautious Cass
agents.role: Overconfidence check; safest reply + where confidence outruns evidence.

agents.name: Literal Lena
agents.role: Literalist; what was literally asked vs what Brain is inflating it into.

agents.name: Counter Cole
agents.role: Contrarian; strongest case against Brain's leaning.

agents.name: Pivot Piper
agents.role: Third door; rejects the framed binary and reframes the question.

agents.name: Novice Nia
agents.role: Naive questioner; beginner questions that expose foundational errors. Bound to Domain Dara.

agents.name: Domain Dara
agents.role: Domain expert; the outside specialist the question needs. Bound to Novice Nia.

agents.name: Future Faye
agents.role: Future-self; reviews the draft assuming handoff at this exact step. (Was Wes's Handoff lens.)

agents.name: Risk Rhys
agents.role: Risk & Failure lens.

agents.name: Clever Cleo
agents.role: Elegance & Alternative lens.

agents.name: Polish Polly
agents.role: Quality & Standards lens.

agents.name: Feasible Finn
agents.role: Implementation & Feasibility lens.

agents.name: Scope Skye
agents.role: Boundaries & Creep lens.

agents.name: Eco Enzo
agents.role: Integration & Side Effects lens.

agents.name: Scribe Sana
agents.role: Documentation logger; logs where the permanent record needs updating as work happens.

agents.name: Handoff Hana
agents.role: Handoff packager; the next-session baton.

agents.name: Closing Clio
agents.role: Session-close auditor; inventory refs, log hurdles, reconcile docs + indexes, report health.

agents.name: Scout Sage
agents.role: Research runner; multi-source sourced lookup with confidence + one recommendation.

agents.name: Recon Renata
agents.role: Repo auditor; audits mawizorek/ClickUp_apps vs the operating standard. Read-only.

agents.name: Workshop Wes
agents.role: RETIRED 2026-07-04. Decomposed into The Workshop (6 lenses) + Future Faye. Tombstone.

teams.name: The Council
teams.invocation: always-on (Maestro Mira presides on substantive turns)

domain_procedures.name: World Cup Refresh
domain_procedures.note: Seasonal; reopens next tournament. Went dormant after 2026-07-19 final.
domain_procedures.trigger: match day, bracket, WC score update
